module_sme_rollup.name: Employee Master & Lifecycle
module_sme_rollup.description: Centralized employee records, onboarding, offboarding, and organizational structure.

statements.text: Capture and maintain complete employee master with ID, personal details, employment status, compensation, and work history.
statements.rationale: Single source of truth for all employee data

statements.text: Support multiple active contracts per employee with version control and custom compliance fields.
Auto-launch onboarding checklist on offer acceptance; collect identity, tax, banking, and documents digitally.
statements.rationale: Streamlines new hire setup and compliance

statements.text: Enable electronic contract signature, equipment provisioning, buddy assignment, and first-week check-ins.
Trigger offboarding checklist on resignation; calculate final settlement and track access revocation.
statements.rationale: Ensures compliant and complete exit process

statements.text: Auto-generate organizational chart from reporting-manager data; support matrix and dotted-line relationships.

module_sme_rollup.name: Time, Attendance & Leave
module_sme_rollup.description: Clock in/out, leave management, shift scheduling, and time-off accrual.

statements.text: Support clock in/out via web, mobile, biometric, RFID, QR, or facial recognition with geolocation capture.
statements.rationale: Flexible attendance capture for all work environments

statements.text: Flag attendance exceptions: late arrivals, absences, early departures, and unmatched punches automatically.
Configure leave types with accrual rules, carry-forward limits, encashment terms, and block-out dates.
statements.rationale: Enforces leave policy and statutory compliance

statements.text: Submit leave applications with document attachment; route through multi-level approval with real-time balance visibility.
Support half-day and hourly leave granularity; display team leave calendar and absence status.
statements.rationale: Enables flexible leave and team planning

statements.text: Calculate leave accrual based on service length and employment type; pro-rate for joiners and leavers.
Build and publish shift rosters by location; enforce rest-day and maximum-hours rules automatically.
statements.rationale: Ensures compliant scheduling and labour planning

statements.text: Enable shift-swap and open-shift marketplace; send automated notifications to employees.

module_sme_rollup.name: Payroll, Compensation & Benefits
module_sme_rollup.description: Salary processing, statutory compliance, compensation management, and benefits administration.

statements.text: Configure salary structures with earnings and deductions; calculate CPF, SDL, FWL per Singapore statutory rates.
Handle variable pay, bonuses, prorated pay for joiners/leavers, and mid-month changes with recalculation.
Calculate overtime with configurable multipliers; enforce monthly caps and flag regulatory violations.
Generate itemized payslips with earnings, deductions, CPF, and YTD totals; distribute securely via portal or email.
statements.rationale: Transparent pay communication and self-service access

statements.text: Post payroll journal entries to GL with approval workflow and audit trail; generate compliance reports.
Define salary bands and pay grades; execute compensation review cycles with manager input and merit matrices.
Configure benefit plans with eligibility rules; enable self-enrolment and manage flex benefit programmes.
Generate total rewards statements showing salary, benefits, and compensation value to employees.

module_sme_rollup.name: Recruitment, Performance & Development
module_sme_rollup.description: Talent acquisition, performance management, learning, and succession planning.

statements.text: Create job requisitions with budget allocation; publish to career site and job boards with multi-level approval.
Capture applications from web, email, and referrals; track candidate progress through workflow stages.
Match candidates to roles using resume parsing; collect interviewer feedback and scorecards objectively.
Generate offer letters with e-signature; convert selected candidate to employee record with single action.
Support goal cascading from organization to individual; enable ongoing feedback and 360-degree reviews.
Maintain course catalogue with classroom and e-learning; track completion and issue certificates automatically.
Conduct skill-gap analysis; assign mandatory compliance training by role with expiry alerts.
Define critical roles and identify successors with readiness ratings; generate succession coverage reports.

module_sme_rollup.name: Statutory Compliance & Reporting
module_sme_rollup.description: Work permits, statutory filings, data security, and HR analytics.

statements.text: Track work pass type and expiry; alert on renewal deadlines and monitor quota and dependency ratio limits.
Submit employment income tax returns to IRAS via Auto-Inclusion Scheme; generate IR8A and IR21 forms.
Generate and submit monthly CPF contribution files and annual tax forms with audit trail and acknowledgements.
statements.rationale: Ensures timely and accurate statutory submissions

statements.text: Encrypt employee data at rest and in transit; handle NRIC, salary, and medical records in PDPA compliance.
Maintain audit logs of all data access and modifications; enforce role-based access controls by function.
Deactivate user accounts on termination; integrate with external identity providers for single sign-on.
Report headcount trends, turnover rates, recruitment metrics, and absence tracking with export capability.
Post payroll to GL; import employee data from CSV; export to CSV, Excel, PDF, and bank giro formats.
statements.rationale: Enables data flow and system integration

module_sme_rollup.name: Employee Engagement & Self-Service
module_sme_rollup.description: Portal access, expense claims, surveys, and document management.

statements.text: Employees update personal and emergency contact information; view payslips and apply for leave independently.
Employees update bank account details, submit expense claims, and access company policies via portal.
Submit expense claims with photo receipts; code to GL accounts; route through multi-level approval workflow.
statements.rationale: Controls expense spend and audit trail

statements.text: Calculate mileage claims automatically; track employee advances and settle against submitted claims.
Encrypt documents at rest and in transit; control access by role; alert on expiry of work permits and certificates.
statements.rationale: Secures HR documents and compliance tracking

statements.text: Survey builder with pre-built templates; collect anonymous responses; calculate eNPS and action planning.
System accessible via web and native mobile apps; adapts layout across all screen sizes automatically.

Platform & Data.narrative: This family ensures your HR system is secure, accessible, and connected to your payroll, government agencies, and banks. Singapore SMEs must comply with PDPA when handling employee NRICs, salaries, and medical data—this family enforces that compliance and prevents unauthorised access. It matters when your HR team works from different locations, when you integrate with your accountant's system, or when you need to submit CPF and IRAS returns electronically.

Core HR.narrative: This is the backbone of your HR system—a single, authoritative record of every employee's personal details, contracts, employment history, and documents. Singapore SMEs need this to onboard new staff smoothly, manage their legal obligations (contracts, offer letters), and answer questions about who reports to whom. It matters when you hire your first employee, when you need to prove employment history to MOM, or when you're restructuring teams.

Time & Attendance.narrative: This family tracks when employees work, manages their leave requests, and calculates overtime and shift patterns. For retail, F&B, logistics, and field-based SMEs, accurate time tracking directly affects payroll accuracy and labour cost control. It matters when you have shift workers, when you need to prove compliance with MOM working-hour rules, or when you're calculating overtime pay for monthly payroll.

Payroll & Statutory.narrative: This family calculates every employee's salary, deducts CPF and tax, generates payslips, and produces the statutory returns (CPF, IRAS, MOM) that Singapore law requires. Getting payroll wrong costs you penalties and damages employee trust; this family automates compliance and reduces manual errors. It matters every month when you pay staff, at year-end when you file IRAS AIS, and whenever you hire foreign workers.

Talent & Growth.narrative: This family helps you hire the right people, develop them, manage their performance, and plan their careers—from job posting through recruitment, training, appraisals, and compensation planning. Singapore SMEs compete for talent in a tight labour market; this family helps you attract, retain, and grow your best people. It matters when you're hiring, when you want to give merit increases fairly, or when you're trying to reduce turnover.

Lifecycle & Analytics.narrative: This family gives HR leaders and line managers dashboards showing headcount, turnover, cost per hire, and other workforce metrics—so you can spot trends and make data-driven decisions. Singapore SMEs often lack visibility into HR costs and people risks; these dashboards help you understand where your money goes and where you might lose key staff. It matters when you're planning your annual budget, when you want to benchmark your turnover against industry norms, or when you're deciding where to invest in hiring.
